headline: A Look At Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) has recorded a series of negative returns recently, with the stock down about 1.5% over the past day, 4.4% over the past week and 9.2% over the past month. Over the past 3 months the decline is about 20.9%, with the year-to-date return at roughly a 19.1% decline and the 1-year total return at about a 39.4% decline, set against a 3-year total return of 10.2% and a 5-year total return of 70.1%. The company has a market...

headline: Negative Sentiment Around Insurance-Related Companies Pressured Arthur J Gallagher (AJG)
summary: Janus Henderson Investors, an investment management company, released its “Global Sustainable Equity Fund” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. In the fourth quarter of 2025, global equity markets experienced a significant upswing, with many indices hitting new all-time highs. headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires International Insurance Brokers Pty Ltd
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today announced the acquisition of Brisbane, Queensland-based International Insurance Brokers Pty Ltd. Terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
